---
title: "Facilitation Practices to Support Access, Inclusion, & Belonging"
author: "Inclusive Facilitation Series"
description: "Explore the benefits of inclusive facilitation and develop participants’ comfort and skill in facilitating virtual and in person sessions that engage people across differences"
categories:
    - <span style='color:#0096c7'>Embrace Vulnerability</span>
    - <span style='color:#0096c7'>Empathize</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Build Capacity in Others</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Embrace Complexity</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Move at the Speed of Trust</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Work to Transform Power</span>
    - <span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Deliver High Quality Results</span>
    - <span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Drive Cycles of Continuous Improvement and Evolution</span>
    - <span style='color:#7b2cbf'>Ensure Belonging Access and Opportunity</span>
format:
  html:
    title-block-categories: false
---

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/inclusive-facilitation/content/belonging.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/inclusive-facilitation/content/belonging.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
